name: Ashitaba
summary: It is best framed around chalcone-rich chemistry with modest translational evidence.
description: It is best framed around chalcone-rich chemistry with modest translational evidence.
safetyNotes: May influence glucose or metabolic markers; monitor with antidiabetic medications and avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless clinician-supervised.
interactions: Potential additive bleeding risk with anticoagulants/antiplatelets

sources.title: Possible antithrombotic effects of Angelica keiskei (Ashitaba)
A Review of the Medicinal Uses and Pharmacology of Ashitaba

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Leaf/stem powder and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Leaf/stem powder and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
